nodes.name: V2PresetBarItem

	preset,
	visibleIndex,
	hotkeyId,
	isDark,
	agents,
	onExecutePreset,
	onEdit,
	onLocalReorder,

nodes.name: V2WorkspaceRunButton
params:
{
	projectId,
	definition,
	isRunning,
	isPending,
	canForceStop,
	onToggle,
	onForceStop,
}

edges.to:
q
				.from({ projects: collections.v2Projects })
				.where(({ projects }) =>
					eq(projects.organizationId, activeOrganizationId ?? ""),
				)
				.select

q
				.from({ projects: collections.v2Projects })
				.where(({ projects }) =>
					eq(projects.organizationId, activeOrganizationId),
				)
				.select

q
				.from({ projects: collections.v2Projects })
				.where(({ projects }) =>
					eq(projects.organizationId, activeOrganizationId),
				)
				.select

electronTrpcClient.external.openFileInEditor
				.mutate({
					path,
					line: opts?.line,
					column: opts?.column,
					worktreePath,
					projectId,
					app: v2PreferredApp,
				})
				.catch
